title: padus velutina
intro: Padus velutina, also known as the Japanese bird cherry or Japanese lilac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Padus velutina include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Padus velutina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and immune system function.
